meaning: 諡臥逃蟆泌刀隨ｬ[蟾ｴ蝓ｺ譁ｯ蝮ｦ荳懷圏驛ｨ蝓主ｸ﹅
examples: Captured in Rawalpindi, Pakistan and now in Gitmo.
Ms. Bhutto was assassinated in the city of Rawalpindi a week ago while campaigning for parliament.
A military band played martial tunes and the national anthem as Musharraf visited the joint staff headquarters in Rawalpindi.
Former Prime Minister Benazir Bhutto was killed by a suicide bomber in Rawalpindi in December.
The fast bowler was charged with publicly criticising the board at a disciplinary hearing in Rawalpindi.
